vllm.title: [Attention] Use FA3 for MLA on Hopper
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Make sure we are using FA3 for MLA prefill on Hopper

vllm.title: [misc] Reduce number of config file requests to HuggingFace
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Every time _get_encoder_config is called, get_sentence_transformer_tokenizer_config also gets called and that triggers 7 different calls to HF to check whether any sentence transformer config file exists in the repo. This is more calls than needed and sometimes lead to timeout/connection issue in CI

vllm.title: [Kernel] Make rotary_embedding ops more flexible with input shape
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #12729 (comment)

 Clean up deepseek-v2/v3 and mla attention implementation

#12807 broke xformers fallback because AssertionError from assert is_fa_version_supported(fa_version) is not included in the exception:

        Lines 611 to 616
      in
      c786e75

vllm.title: [V1] LoRA Support
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Changes:

Run LoRA requests through V1

All LoRA functionality is put in a LoRAGPUModelRunnerMixin class that the GPUModelRunner inherits.
Changes to GPUModelRunner for loading lora models and setting active loras before every run.


Prefix caching

Add lora_id as a key to prefix caching hash.


Sch

vllm.title: Add Bamba Model
vllm.author: fabianlim
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is the companion PR to an huggingface PR for adding Bamba, which is a hybrid mamba2 architecture with SwiGLU. The checkpoints are jointly trained by IBM, Princeton, and UIUC.
In this PR we have:

 Created the bamba model inference architecture, which we would like acknowledge the jamba team for

vllm.author: houseroad
vllm.bodyExcerpt:

Missed some files in the previous PR, since their more config files were checked after the code sync.
Test PR (which include some files including space in the file name): #12805

vllm.title: [misc] Revert # 12833
vllm.author: khluu

vllm.title: Prevent unecessary requests to huggingface hub
vllm.author: maxdebayser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When repository files are already present in the cache or a model directory, we shouldn't try to open http connections to huggingface hub to verify if the files exist.
cc: @ywang96 @khluu
